text: Hello dear friends 🥰
Onions contain vitamin C (80-100 grams of onions fully cover the daily requirement of this nutrient). They also contain
vitamins B1, B2, B6, PP, and E; proteins; fats; organic acids; and trace elements, including iron, calcium, potassium, phosphorus, magnesium, and sodium.
The characteristic onion smell is due to the presence of essential oils in this vegetable,
as well as sulfur and phytoncides – substances with antimicrobial properties.
Grate one onion.
Onions have a stimulating and toning effect on the mucous membranes.
They increase libido in women, so it is recommended for both partners to consume them.
To get rid of onion breath, rinse your mouth with water and then chew parsley leaves.
Onions are also beneficial for men because they help prevent prostate cancer.
Squeeze the onion juice through a sieve or cheesecloth.
Experts believe that a daily intake of just 10 grams of this vegetable
reduces the risk of prostate cancer by half.
Scientists recommend the following for adenomas and prostatic hypertrophy:
drink the juice from one onion and add a small amount of honey
(10 ml honey) .
Mix well. Take
this portion of onion juice once a day,
2-3 hours before bedtime.
The treatment duration is 3 weeks.
❗Friends, ALWAYS consult your doctor before use!❗
Thank you for watching, subscribing, liking, and commenting! 👍
Take care, dear friend! 💖
